title: Sukh Sajjan
desc: Javed Akhtar says to understand the good in life one must experience the bad. One understands the value of love and relationships when it starts to part ways. S01 E70.

title: Hoye Na Karaj
desc: Javed Akhtar says nobody is indispensable in this world. One must remember that work and everything else will continue to happen whether he/she contributes or not. S01 E65.

title: Kaal Kare So
desc: The common human problem of postponing one's tasks is very humorously explained by Javed Akhtar in this episode. S01 E81.

title: Jaani Bujhi
desc: Javed Akhtar explains the concept of having a conscience and deflecting from moral compass and running away from responsibilities is wrong. He says awareness is a burden if not implemented. S01 E55.

title: Deh Dhare Ko
desc: Some people think all problems happen to them but is it true or is it just a perspective? Javed Akhtar shares his thoughts on the same. S01 E79.
